boundary: Rust/local localization validation; generation is proposal-only; browser/Studio surfaces remain read-only or draft-only; trusted writes route through the existing review/apply/trust-gradient path; no automated fun, quality, production, release, or Godot replacement claim; generated runs/artifacts remain untracked unless fixture-scoped; #1 and #23 remain open
generatedStatePolicy: fixture-scoped only; generated localization proposals and validation reports remain untracked unless explicitly committed as fixtures

entries.context: Deckbuilder UI panel title shown in the in-game JS runtime.
